word: G5248 - ὑπερπερισσεύω - hyperperisseúō - hoop-er-per-is-syoo'-o - Abound much more

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑπερπερισσεύω

- Transliteration: Huperperisseuo

- Phonetic: hoop-er-per-is-syoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to abound beyond measure, abound exceedingly

2. to overflow, to enjoy abundantly

- Origin: from G5228 and G4052

- TDNT entry: 06:58,8

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5228 and G4052; to super abound: - abound much more exceeding.
